nasb.text: Now the captain of the bodyguard had taken Jeremiah and said to him, “The Lord your God promised this calamity against this place;

esv.text: The captain of the guard took Jeremiah and said to him, “The Lord your God pronounced this disaster against this place.

cnv.text: 護衛長把耶利米提出來，對他說：“耶和華你的　神曾說要降這災禍在這地方；

ccb.text: 护卫长释放耶利米之前对他说：“你的上帝耶和华曾说要在这里降下灾祸，
